title: croton aleuritoides
intro: Croton aleuritoides, also known as jianghuang or aleurites, is a plant species in the family Euphorbiaceae, native to southern China and Southeast Asia. It is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and immunomodulatory effects. The health benefits of Croton aleuritoides include its ability to improve skin conditions such as eczema and acne, as well as its potential to lower blood sugar levels and improve immune function. In traditional Chinese medicine, Croton aleuritoides is often prepared as a herbal tea or tincture, which is used to treat a variety of ailments, including digestive issues and respiratory problems.
